case_title: WILLIAMS, KEITH C. VS BOOTH, KEVIN SR DBA 2001 AUTO BODY & PAINT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KEITH C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOTH, KEVIN SR DBA 2001 AUTO BODY & PAINT $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $290.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $322.39 AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, KEVIN SR DBA 2001 AUTO BODY & PAINT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, KEITH C. AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, KEVIN SR DBA 2001 AUTO BODY & PAINT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
